Football: UEFA Conference League - match: KF Shkendija - Jagiellonia Białystok
programme.desc: The Pride of Podlasie started the league phase of the youngest UEFA competition with a modest victory over Hamrun Spartans 1-0.In the second round, Adrian Siemieniec's players faced the strong RC Strasbourg, drawing with them away 1-1.Now they are on a delegation to Skopje.KF Shkendija has a 0-2 defeat against Rayo Vallecano and a 1-0 victory over Shelbourne FC.Jagiellonia will be the favorite in the match at the stadium.Todor Proeski.Let's hope it plays its role better than the Lech Poznań players in the confrontation with Lincoln Red Imps from Gibraltar.

Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Jagiellonia Białystok - KuPS Kuopio
programme.desc: At the halfway point of the regular phase of the Conference League, Pride of Podlasie is in thirteenth place, which guarantees seeding in the play-off phase.Adrian Siemieniec's players remain undefeated, but they cannot be proud of their last performance.They only drew 1-1 with Macedonian Shkendija and scored the equalizing goal in the tenth minute of added time.Jagiellonia has a match against KuPS Kuopio, which, like itself, has five points.The Finnish team will take the field in Białystok encouraged by their 3-1 victory over Slovan Bratislava in the previous round.

Football: UEFA Conference League - match: Omonia FC - Raków Częstochowa
programme.desc: The Medals are one of three teams in the Conference League that have not yet been defeated in the regular round.The Częstochowa team has already secured their place in the knockout phase, but they do not intend to be satisfied with that.They are counting on direct promotion to the 1/8 finals, which will give them a place in the best eight at the end of the league phase of the competition.Before the clash with Omonia, coached by former Legia coach Henning Berg, they are in third place in the table.The team from Nicosia is fifteenth and has eight points, three less than Raków.

Football: UEFA Europa League - match: Aston Villa FC - FC Salzburg
programme.desc: The hosts are impressive in their form both domestically and in European cups.In the current edition of the Europa League, they lost only once - to Go Ahead Eagles (1-2), but since then they have won four in a row, including the last one over Fenerbahce (1-0).Aston Villa is already certain of promotion, taking second place in the table.The situation of the Austrians is definitely more difficult.RB Salzburg managed to win only two games and lost five.They are in a distant 28th place in the classification, and in order to advance to the play-off phase of the 1/16 finals, they must win in Birmingham and count on their rivals' mistakes.

programme.title: Polsat Sport Talk Extra
programme.sub-title: dr Michał Rynkowski
programme.desc: Przemysław Iwańczyk talks about sports with people from outside his circle, including:from culture, medicine, science and politics.Thanks to them, sport appears as a complex process influencing results.

programme.title: Motorcycle World Championship: Spanish Grand Prix - 1st training session in the Moto3 class
Motorcycle World Championship: Spanish Grand Prix - 1st training session in the Moto2 class
programme.desc: Moto2 is dominated by Spanish riders, who occupy the first three places in the general classification.The leader is Manuel Gonzalez, who did not do well in the US Grand Prix, finishing the race in fifth position.Australian Senna Agius won the Circuit of the Americas.The biggest surprise of the competition was the result of Daniel Holgado, who finished only 16th.Spanish fans hope that one of their compatriots will win during the competition at the Circuito Permanente de Jerez.

UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Odense - Wisła Kraków 01.12.2011 - sezon 2011/2012
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

Football: German League - match: RB Leipzig - 1. FC Union Berlin
programme.desc: Until recently, it seemed that RB Leipzig could only fight to finish the season in third place.However, Borussia Dortmund surprised with two defeats in a row and the Red Bulls will certainly try to fight for the runner-up position.In the 31st round they will face Union Berlin, which is not in the best shape - in the last four matches it recorded one draw and three defeats.With this victory, the team from Leipzig can extend its series of league wins - they have four of them so far.

Football: German League - match: 1. FSV Mainz 05 - FC Bayern Munich
programme.desc: The Bavarians already have the title of German champions in their pocket.Moreover, the team led by Vincent Kompany has already scored 160 goals in all competitions this season.In this way he broke the club record set six years ago.He will try to outdo him in the match against FSV Mainz.However, the Zero-Five can stand up to Bayern, which they proved in December when they drew 2-2 in Munich.They may be tempted to make an even bigger surprise in front of their home crowd, especially since the Munich team will be saving their strength for the first semi-final match of the Champions League against PSG.

Men's volleyball: PlusLiga - 1st semi-final match of the play-off phase: Aluron CMC Warta Zawiercie - Asseco Resovia Rzeszów
Women's volleyball: TAURON Liga - 1st match for 3rd place: UNI Opole - BKS BOSTIK ZGO Bielsko-Biała
programme.desc: In the fight for 3rd place, we will see the UNI Opole volleyball players against the players of BKS BOSTIK ZGO Bielsko-Biała.The hosts were eliminated from the semi-finals of the play-off phase after just two matches with PGE Budowlani Łódź.Bartłomiej Piekarczyk's players competed with KS DevelopRes Rzeszów.This clash was more even, and three matches had to be played to decide the outcome.For the volleyball players from Bielsko-Biała, it's a repeat of last year.Then they also competed for the bronze medal, but they had to admit the superiority of PGE Budowlani Łódź.

programme.title: Women's volleyball: TAURON Liga - 1st final match of the play-off phase: KS DevelopRes Rzeszów - PGE Budowlani Łódź
programme.desc: In the grand final of TAURON Liga, Jelena Blagojević's players will face PGE Budowlani Łódź.This will be the third clash between these teams this season.Each team won one victory in the league, while in the semi-final of the Polish Cup the Łódź team prevailed and finally won the trophy.The visiting team eliminated UNI Opole in the play-off semi-finals after winning two matches.In turn, the volleyball players of KS DevelopRes Rzeszów faced BKS BOSTIK ZGO Bielsko-Biała, and three matches were needed to advance.

UEFA Europa League Archive
programme.sub-title: Legia Warszawa - Hapoel Tel Awiw 29.09.2011 - sezon 2011/2012
programme.desc: In the program, viewers will see fragments of memorable matches played in the UEFA Europa League.From the 2009/2010 season, this competition replaced the previous UEFA Cup.The authors pay special attention to matches involving Polish clubs.The first Polish team to win the right to play in the LE group stage was Lech Poznań, later Wisła Kraków and Legia Warszawa also achieved this feat.The greatest success so far was promotion to the 1/16 finals of Lech in the 2010/2011 season, Legia and Wisła in the 2011/2012 season and Legia Warszawa in the 2014/2015 season.

Motorcycle World Championship: Spanish Grand Prix - Moto3 class race
Motorcycle World Championship: Spanish Grand Prix - Moto2 class race
programme.desc: Moto2 is dominated by Spanish riders, who occupy the first three places in the general classification.The leader is Manuel Gonzalez, who did not do well in the US Grand Prix, finishing the race in fifth position.Australian Senna Agius won the Circuit of the Americas.The biggest surprise of the competition was the result of Daniel Holgado, who finished only 16th.Spanish fans hope that one of their compatriots will win during the competition at the Circuito Permanente de Jerez.

Athletes
programme.desc: Atleci is a magazine for everyone who loves sport.The program includes reports from events, conversations with stars, as well as practical advice, interesting people and unique places on the sports map of Poland.

programme.title: Football: German League - match: 1. FSV Mainz 05 - FC Bayern Munich
programme.desc: The Bavarians already have the title of German champions in their pocket.Moreover, the team led by Vincent Kompany has already scored 160 goals in all competitions this season.In this way he broke the club record set six years ago.He will try to outdo him in the match against FSV Mainz.However, the Zero-Five can stand up to Bayern, which they proved in December when they drew 2-2 in Munich.They may be tempted to make an even bigger surprise in front of their home crowd, especially since the Munich team will be saving their strength for the first semi-final match of the Champions League against PSG.

programme.desc: Until recently, it seemed that RB Leipzig could only fight to finish the season in third place.However, Borussia Dortmund surprised with two defeats in a row and the Red Bulls will certainly try to fight for the runner-up position.In the 31st round they will face Union Berlin, which is not in the best shape - in the last four matches it recorded one draw and three defeats.With this victory, the team from Leipzig can extend its series of league wins - they have four of them so far.

programme.desc: During the competition in the Milenium Hall in Kołobrzeg, martial arts fans will watch several interesting duels.In the most important of them, Oleksii Polishchuk, who has so far appeared in galas under the KSW banner, will face Edgar Javier Davalos Nunez.Łukasz Szulc will say goodbye to the Hybrid MMA organization with a fight against Rafał Lewon.Their fight will take place under boxing rules.The fans will also be warmed up by fights between the favorite of the Kołobrzeg audience, Damian Mieczkowski and Patryk Domarus, and Michał Hawro and Gabriel Gilthon.

Ninja vs. Ninja
programme.desc: The new season of the program promises competition at the highest level.However, the age of participants is lowering - even sixteen-year-olds will take part in this edition.They want to prove that experience does not necessarily always trump youthful zeal and enthusiasm.The Poland versus the rest of the world formula was restored to the program.In this edition, Jan Tatarowicz has a chance to take away the title of best ninja from the previous season from Clément Gravier.The program will also feature runner-up Samuel Folsom and Isabella Folsom - winner of the Last Woman Standing title.These athletes are among the world's best today.Polish players will be supported by experienced leaders and coaches, including:Paweł Murawski, Krzysztof Orankiewicz, Grzegorz Matyszewski and Grzegorz Niecko.Special guests are also expected to participate, such as Piotr Żyła and Bartek Wrona.

programme.title: Boxing: Polsat Boxing Promotions 10 in Łódź - super middleweight: Osleys Iglesias - Ezequiel Maderna 24/09/2022
programme.desc: El Tornado de Cuba, Osleys Iglesias tied his fate with Poland.Since December 2021, he has appeared in galas organized by Polsat Boxing Promotions three times and emerged victorious three times.The talented Cuban's opponent will be a very experienced boxer from Argentina.35-year-old Ezequiel Maderna has 35 professional fights, 27 of which he won.Recently, however, he has not had a good streak and has suffered three defeats in a row.In March 2022, he was defeated by, among others, Paweł Stępień.
